name: traceloop-sdk

metadata.name: traceloop-sdk
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Traceloop Software Development Kit (SDK) for Python

documentation:
# traceloop-sdk

Traceloop’s Python SDK allows you to easily start monitoring and debugging your LLM execution. Tracing is done in a non-intrusive way, built on top of OpenTelemetry. You can choose to export the traces to Traceloop, or to your existing observability stack.

```python
Traceloop.init(app_name="joke_generation_service")

@workflow(name="joke_creation")
def create_joke():
    completion = openai.ChatCompletion.create(
        model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Tell me a joke about opentelemetry"}],
    )

    return completion.choices[0].message.content
```

modules.name: traceloop.sdk.tracing.content_allow_list
documentation: Manages list of associated properties for which content tracing
(prompts, vector embeddings, etc.) is allowed.

documentation: Clear list of collected spans.

methods.name: traceloop.sdk.utils.in_memory_span_exporter.InMemorySpanExporter.get_finished_spans
documentation: Get list of collected spans.

methods.name: traceloop.sdk.utils.in_memory_span_exporter.InMemorySpanExporter.export
documentation: Stores a list of spans in memory.

methods.name: traceloop.sdk.utils.in_memory_span_exporter.InMemorySpanExporter.shutdown
documentation:
Shut downs the exporter.

Calls to export after the exporter has been shut down will fail.

Implementation of {class}`.SpanExporter` that stores spans in memory.

This class can be used for testing purposes. It stores the exported spans
in a list in memory that can be retrieved using the
{func}`.get_finished_spans` method.
